case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 777 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3235/2023 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case. 26-09-2025 Petitioner, namely Abdul Ghaffar Panhwar, who appears in person is called absent nor any intimation received on his behalf. On 02-05-2023, Petitioner was directed to file documentary evidence / photographs showing that the subject land was WAQF for dispensary, but the said order has not been complied with. The instant Petition is pending since, 2023 without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant petition has been served or he has lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
